Network.Description: China National Seismic Network, Data Management Centre of China National Seismic Network at Institute of Geophysics, CEA (SeisDmc)
GEOSCOPE - French Global Network of Seismological Broadband Stations (GEOSCOPE)

Comment.Value: Occasional data loss due to power problems
Error on sensors poles may reach 2 percent
Station has occasional gaps due to record dropouts

Station.Description: (GSN) New CDSN (IC) - USGS, IRIS, IG and CEA
(GSN) New CDSN (IC) - USGS, IRIS, IG and CEA
